examples: It was a preference for naturalness and simplicity that separated the Taoists from the Confucians.
Teenagers lose their childhood simplicity and naturalness.
The naturalness of the dialogue made the book so true to life.
He delivers two prime pieces of sarcasm with stunning naturalness, as if he thought of them himself.
More and more, our powerful technological achievements will butt heads with our sense of naturalness and fairness.
